# Third-Party License Texts

This directory contains standard license texts used by the repository-level
license audit in `../../THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md`.

The texts were retrieved from the SPDX License List on 2026-05-07:

- `MIT.txt`
- `Apache-2.0.txt`
- `BSD-2-Clause.txt`
- `BSD-3-Clause.txt`
- `GPL-3.0-only.txt`
- `LGPL-3.0-only.txt`
- `CC-BY-4.0.txt`
- `CC-BY-SA-4.0.txt`
- `Zlib.txt`

Project-specific copyright notices and source URLs are recorded in
`../../THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` and in task-local `NOTICE.md` files.
